Welcome…

We are Terawit & Company Ltd

We help organisations achieve an optimal symphony of internal, external, human and non-human systems

 

 

 

 

 

 

As your quintessential partner, we make it a habit  to understand what you do 

then help you do it even better!

Modus Operandi

  • 1

    Examine the linen

    We look at the good, the bad, and everything in between

  • 2

    Explore the challenges in detail

    We explore the causes and the best solutions critical to the growth of your business

  • 3

    Agree on anticipated results

    This helps to clarify expections

  • 4

    Unknot the Knot

    This is where the magic happens...where the problems receive solutions

  • 5

    All Done!

    You are now operating a better level of efficiency

  • 6

    And then...

    Follow-ups

Some of Our Business Solutions

Tera Recruit

Terawit’s recruitment business proposition is all about excellence in Quality, Time and Costs, based on the Japanese business philosophy of Kaizen.


‘Kaizen’ stands for continuous improvement of work processes and personal efficiency.  We constantly improve our processes in order to help you fill those roles with quality hires knowing that they are critical to the attainment of your organisational objectives. 

More

Tera L & D

Training goes beyond an attempt to transfer knowledge.

The objective of any training is to ensure that learning has taken place to the end that skills required to attain organisational objectives are supplied constantly.

Our learning consultants proffer tailor-made techniques rather than a one-size-fits-all approach to reducing skill gaps within organisations whilst keeping a tab on the Returns on Training Investment (ROTI).

More

TERA Finance

 

Terawit’s financial consultants are working with CEOs and CFOs to gather, interpret, and deliver the insights that deliver timely, smart and three-dimensional decisions towards organisational growth, development and sustainability. 

We can help you build a finely balanced set of innovative capabilities across strategy, operations, analytics, performance management, talent and reporting.

Talk to us and lets get creative financially.

More

TERA Advisory

Our Advisory Services Include:

A range of consulting services provided by Chartered Accountants, Chartered Professionals and other Financial Advisors to businesses and high net worth individuals who require specialized advice on Capital Formation, Capital Aquisition, Mergers, Acquisition, Cash Flow, Risk Management, Human Capital Management and Wealth Management.

More

Our Vision

 

To become the preferred professional services firm in Sub-Saharan Africa, providing sustainable Business Solutions and contributing to the success stories of African businesses and Public Entities
